headline: HPE posts mixed Q1 earnings, boosts outlook: CEO discusses
summary: HPE (HPE) reported mixed first quarter results but lifted its outlook for 2026 profit. HPE CEO Antonio Neri speaks with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about the earnings results and outlook, highlighting how artificial intelligence (AI) is driving increased demand for data centers. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Asking for a Trend.

headline: Oracle Steals the Spotlight as Oil Drama and Mixed Earnings Shake Up Wall Street
summary: A rollercoaster session on Wall Street ended largely flat as oil markets whipsawed on conflicting signals from the US–Iran conflict. After the close, Oracle delivered a convincing earnings beat that sent shares sharply higher, while Kohl's and NIO served up their own dramatic storylines during the regular session.
